title: Gayatri Mantra
intro: Read the sacred Gayatri Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra for wisdom, knowledge and inner radiance.
description:
॥ Gayatri Mantra ॥

Om Bhur Bhuvah Svah
Tat Savitur Varenyam
Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi
Dhiyo Yo Nah Prachodayat ॥

The Gayatri Mantra is considered the most sacred mantra of the Rig Veda. It is revered as a prayer to Gayatri, the Mother of the Vedas.

faq.a1: The Gayatri Mantra is a highly sacred Vedic mantra from the Rig Veda, dedicated to Savitr (the Sun deity). It is regarded as the greatest of all Vedic mantras.
faq.q2: What are the benefits of chanting the Gayatri Mantra?
faq.a2: Regular chanting sharpens the intellect, improves concentration, calms the mind and removes negative energy.
faq.q3: When should the Gayatri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a3: Chanting at sunrise, noon and sunset (the three sandhya times) is considered most auspicious.
faq.q4: How many times should the Gayatri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a4: Chanting 108 times with a rudraksha mala is considered ideal. If time is short, one may chant 3, 9 or 27 times.
